nasb.text: Therefore, confess your sins to one another, and pray for one another so that you may be healed. The effective prayer of a righteous man can accomplish much.

esv.text: Therefore, confess your sins to one another and pray for one another, that you may be healed. The prayer of a righteous person has great power as it is working.

cnv.text: 所以你們應當彼此認罪，互相代求，這樣你們就可以痊愈。義人祈禱所發出的力量，是大有功效的。

ccb.text: 所以你们要彼此认罪，互相代祷，好得到医治。义人的祷告有极大的力量和功效。

csbs.text: 所以你们当彼此认罪，彼此代求，好使你们得痊愈。义人所做的祈祷是大有力量的。
